name: Patrick Hanrahan
role: Ward-connected local fixer and procurement intermediary
secrets: He does not know the full sabotage target, only the logistics behind access
knowledge: He arranged unofficial labor and after-hours deliveries
He knows which watchmen can be bribed
He suspects foreign involvement but cares more about money
represents: REQUIRES FACT-CHECK — verify whether this is a documented individual from the World's Columbian Exposition, Chicago, 1893
trustLogic: He opens up to practical deals, not moral appeals.
introAnchor: a ward-connected local fixer who arranged labor and deliveries for the fair through channels no official would ask about
privateGoal: Profit from contracts while staying well clear of the wreckage if things go wrong

aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Heavy and slow. Heads toward groups of dock workers where he has authority and protection.
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Calls for help from the crew. Uses his bulk to block and deflect rather than outrun. Counts on allies slowing the player.

strikeFirst.action: A hard shove and a shout for the nearest worker. Not a fighter — creates a scene to draw witnesses.
strikeFirst.condition: Only if the player physically grabs or strikes him first — Hanrahan shoves back instinctively.

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Deflects with humor and partial truths. Redirects suspicion toward someone else.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Will give up operational details — what was moved, where, when — to avoid being the fall guy. Will not name Mercier voluntarily.
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If the player produces direct evidence AND threatens arrest or Burnham's authority — OR if the player physically blocks his exit, grabs him, or takes any action that cuts off his escape route. Physical blocking is sufficient on its own; Hanrahan does not need to be caught with evidence to run.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Threatens to make noise. Calls loudly for dock workers or supervisors nearby. Uses his ward connections as a threat.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Negotiates immediately. Offers a deal. Blames the French contact for the plan and positions himself as a naive middleman.
